summary: “There are a lot of people who would love to give away their prepayment option to get their family into the home they want,” says Adam Rilander, CIO and head of agency MBS strategies at Bright Meadow, in this episode of Credit Crunch. Rilander joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s Erica Adelberg and Noel Hebert to discuss housing affordability, potential unintended consequences of mortgage policy, investment opportunities across the MBS landscape and why higher-coupon paper may be undervalued. summary: Amazon.com Inc. is being investigated by the Senate Small Business Committee for allegedly letting China influence the company’s online marketplace, according to a document reviewed by Bloomberg and two people interviewed as part of the investigation.

summary: Fresh off a corruption firestorm at home that sank his popularity to the lowest level of his presidency, Argentina’s Javier Milei is flying straight into an uproar over bank fraud in Brazil.

title: China Hits Back EU With Export Curbs on Rheinmetall, Others

summary: China slapped export controls on 14 European companies including German defense giant Rheinmetall AG, saying it acted in retaliation against the European Union’s sanctions on mainland and Hong Kong entities.

title: Ukraine’s Fedorov Snubs Zelenskyy Job Offers, Seeking Return

title: Indian Universities Warn Students Against Joining Exam Protests

summary: India’s two leading government-backed universities in Delhi have warned its students against joining the ongoing youth protests, prompting a backlash from political parties and alumni as demonstrations gather pace across the country.

title_cn: 欧洲夏季热浪变得更加致命
summary: Soaring temperatures have shocked people across the continent, with sweltering conditions made worse by climate change.

title: Turkish Lawmaker Exodus Creates New Opposition Behind Ozgur Ozel

title: South African High Court Halts Ramaphosa Impeachment Hearing

title: Trump Rebuilds Tariffs With New Levies on 60 Economies

title: CJP Student Protest Tests Modi's Rising India Vision as Youth Seek Jobs

title: Cambodia’s Leader Pledges to Tackle Evolving Scam Networks

summary: Cambodian Prime Minister Hun Manet pledged to step up a crackdown on transnational online scam networks, but warned the criminal syndicates are adapting by fracturing into smaller, decentralized cells across the region.

title: Bangladesh President Shahabuddin to Resign Citing Health Reason
title_cn: 孟加拉国总统沙哈布丁因健康原因辞职
summary: Bangladesh’s President Mohammed Shahabuddin, a long time ally of ousted Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina, will be resigning on health grounds later on Friday, according to his spokesman.
